title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BAQUILAO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALCALA, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO SAN ESTEBAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 264 / 55 OG No. 17, 3087 (April 27, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2112, April 05, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BAQUILAO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALCALA, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO SAN ESTEBAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Baquilao in the Municipality of Alcala, Province of Cagayan, is changed to San Esteban.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 5, 1959.
